name: Carbon
description: IBM's open-source design system providing components for React, Vue, Angular, Svelte, and Web Components with comprehensive data visualization

description.value: IBM's open-source design system providing components for React, Vue, Angular, Svelte, and Web Components with comprehensive data visualization

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - v11.97.0 released December 3, 2025; maintained by IBM with 13,615 total commits and 1,041 releases

framework.comment: React and Web Components maintained by Carbon Core team; Vue, Angular, and Svelte maintained by community

styling-approach.comment: Requires Dart Sass for compiling styles; uses SCSS/Sass architecture

component-model.comment: Fully styled components implementing IBM's Carbon design system

typescript.comment: TypeScript comprises 39.3% of codebase; ongoing project to add .d.ts files to @carbon/react

ssr-compatible.comment: Supports Next.js and other SSR frameworks; Carbon tutorial updated for Next.js 13+

rsc-compatible.comment: React Server Components NOT natively supported; interactive components require 'use client' directive

design-system.comment: Implements IBM Design Language; Carbon is IBM's official open-source design system

dark-mode.comment: Built-in light (White, Gray 10) and dark (Gray 90, Gray 100) themes with color tokens for easy switching

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via Theme component with 52 universal color variables; supports inline theming

css-variables.comment: v11 uses CSS custom properties as primary means to apply color (after dropping IE11 support)

design-tokens.comment: @carbon/themes package provides exportable tokens; 52 universal color variables per theme

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via CSS Logical Properties in v11; Web Components have .rtl.min.js builds; BIDI text direction support via textDir property

component-count.comment: Approximately 40 core components including Accordion, Button, Checkbox, ComboBox, DataTable, DatePicker, Dropdown, FileUploader, Modal, Notification, Pagination, ProgressIndicator, Search, Select, Slider, Tabs, Tag, TextInput, Tile, Toggle, and more

text-input.comment: TextInput component with password, disabled, and validation states

textarea.comment: TextArea component for multi-line text input

select.comment: Select component for single selection dropdown

multi-select.comment: MultiSelect and FilterableMultiSelect components for multiple selection

combobox.comment: ComboBox component for searchable/filterable selection with autocomplete

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component for single and grouped checkboxes

switch-toggle.comment: Toggle component for boolean toggle values

tag-input.comment: No dedicated tag input component; Tag component is for display only

date-picker.comment: DatePicker component using flatpickr under the hood; supports simple and calendar-based selection

file-upload.comment: FileUploader component with file list display

dropzone.comment: FileUploaderDropContainer component for drag-and-drop file upload

input-groups.comment: No dedicated input group component for combining inputs with addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown combination component

button-groups.comment: ContentSwitcher component for segmented button groups

table.comment: StructuredList component for basic tabular display

data-table.comment: DataTable component with sorting, filtering, pagination, expandable rows, batch actions, and zebra stripes

tree-view.comment: TreeView component for hierarchical expandable tree structure

list-view.comment: OrderedList and UnorderedList components; StructuredList for more complex lists

card.comment: Tile component serves as card container with clickable, selectable, and expandable variants

badge.comment: No dedicated badge component for status indicators on other elements

tag-chip-pill.comment: Tag component for categorical labels; supports read-only, dismissible, selectable, and operational variants

calendar.comment: No standalone calendar display component; DatePicker includes calendar for selection only

alert.comment: InlineNotification and ActionableNotification for inline alert messages

toast-notification.comment: ToastNotification component for temporary popup notifications

progress-bar.comment: ProgressBar component for determinate progress indication

progress-circle.comment: No circular progress indicator; Loading component provides indeterminate spinner

spinner-loader.comment: Loading component for indeterminate loading indication

skeleton.comment: Skeleton components (SkeletonText, SkeletonIcon, etc.) for content placeholders during loading

modal-dialog.comment: Modal component with passive, transactional, acknowledgment, and progress variants

drawer-sheet.comment: No built-in drawer/sheet component; available in Carbon for IBM Products (@carbon/ibm-products)

popover.comment: Popover component for floating content anchored to trigger

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component for hover hints; also DefinitionTooltip for term definitions

dropdown-menu.comment: OverflowMenu component for action menus with keyboard navigation

context-menu.comment: ContextMenu component for right-click menus (available in @carbon/react)

command-palette.comment: No built-in keyboard-driven command palette component

tabs.comment: Tabs component for tab-based content switching

breadcrumb.comment: Breadcrumb component for hierarchical path navigation

pagination.comment: Pagination component for page navigation controls

stepper.comment: ProgressIndicator component for multi-step process indication and navigation

navigation-menu.comment: UI Shell HeaderNavigation for site navigation with dropdowns

sidebar.comment: UI Shell SideNav for collapsible sidebar navigation

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated mobile-style bottom navigation bar

grid.comment: Grid and FlexGrid components implementing 2x Grid layout system

stack.comment: Stack component for flex-based vertical/horizontal stacking

divider.comment: No dedicated divider component; use CSS borders or hr elements

aspect-ratio.comment: AspectRatio component to maintain aspect ratio

collapsible.comment: Accordion component for expandable/collapsible content sections

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

chart-libraries.comment: @carbon/charts provides 26 chart types built on D3; available for React, Vue, Angular, Svelte, and vanilla JS

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; components work with React Hook Form and Formik via standard Controller pattern

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in CSS animations and transitions for components

icon-libraries.comment: @carbon/icons provides Carbon Design System icons in 16, 20, 24, and 32px sizes; @carbon/icons-react for React

date-libraries.comment: DatePicker uses flatpickr internally; no external date library required

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns; based on IBM Accessibility Checklist (WCAG AA, Section 508, European standards)

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation support for interactive components

screen-reader-tested.comment: Components tested with screen readers as part of accessibility validation

focus-management.comment: Proper focus management in modals and interactive components

wcag-level.comment: Components validated to meet WCAG 2.0 AA and Section 508 guidelines; some components additionally tested against WCAG 2.1

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent - WCAG AA compliant, each component has dedicated accessibility documentation, IBM's enterprise accessibility standards

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle size varies significantly; @carbon/react is modular and tree-shakeable

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable; minimal imports can reduce CSS from 213kB to 2.4kB gzipped for single components

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking with sideEffects: false configuration; individual component imports reduce bundle size significantly

zero-runtime.comment: Uses SCSS compiled to CSS at build time, but components have JavaScript runtime

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be individually imported and lazy loaded

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent - comprehensive component docs with usage guidelines, accessibility notes, code examples, design rationale, and migration guides

interactive-docs.comment: Storybook-based documentation with interactive component playground

storybook.comment: Official Storybook at react.carbondesignsystem.com; featured in Storybook showcase

figma-kit.comment: Official (v11) Carbon Design System Figma library with all components, icons, pictograms, color styles, and grid templates

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool for scaffolding components

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: 62,194 weekly downloads for @carbon/react as of December 2025

commercial-support.comment: Backed by IBM with full-time development team; enterprise-grade support through IBM's ecosystem

style-override.comment: Customization via className and Sass variables/CSS custom properties; theme tokens can be overridden

compound-components.comment: Uses compound component pattern (e.g., Accordion.Item, DataTable.TableHeader, Modal.ModalHeader)

render-props.comment: DataTable and some components support render props for customization

slots.comment: Primarily uses props and compound components rather than named slots pattern

unstyled-mode.comment: Carbon components are styled; no unstyled/headless mode available
